programme.title: Just Like A Christmas Movie
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - Just Like a Christmas Movie
programme.desc: (PG) On the verge of a massive deadline, a cynical workaholic must turn Christmas around in her small town after a small mishap.

programme.title: Candy Cane Christmas
programme.desc: (G) Phoebe loved the magic of Candy Cane Lane at Christmas. This year, the neighbourhood sadly opted to not decorate. Amid her gloom, Phoebe finds the missing piece to her joy: love!

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn'T Dead
programme.desc: (M) Inspired by true events; Erica vanishes and then emerges three years later at her own murder trial with a story full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Pool Boy Nightmare
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
